meta.name: Convertt HR Email Automation Config
meta.placeholder_syntax: [Square Brackets] = fill before send; ALLCAPS: blocks = pick one variant

global_guards.never_instant_after_interview: Hold rejection >= 2h post-interview; prefer next business day.
global_guards.business_hours: Queue non-urgent sends to 09:00 next business day in recipient timezone.
global_guards.suppress_weekends_holidays: Do not send non-urgent email on weekends/public holidays.
global_guards.dedupe: Key sends by (employee_id, template_id, event_id) to prevent replay duplicates.
global_guards.manual_review: Auto-draft only; a human must approve and send.
global_guards.fraud_alert_if_not_self_requested: If change not self-initiated, also notify HR with a fraud flag.
global_guards.stop_all_on_status_change: Cancel queued downstream emails if candidate withdraws or exit is cancelled.

templates.name: Application Received — Acknowledgment
templates.subject: We've received your application — [Job Title] at Convertt
templates.body:
Hi [Candidate First Name],

Thank you for applying for the [Job Title] role at Convertt. We've successfully received your application and our team is reviewing it.

If your profile matches what we're looking for, we'll reach out with the next steps. Either way, you'll hear back from us.

We appreciate your interest in joining us.

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
hr@convertt.co

templates.name: Shortlisted — Moving Forward
templates.subject: Good news — you've been shortlisted for [Job Title]
templates.body:
Hi [Candidate First Name],

Great news! After reviewing your application for the [Job Title] role, we'd like to move you forward in our hiring process.

The next step is [interview / assessment / call]. We'll follow up shortly with details, or feel free to share your availability for [this week / specific dates].

Looking forward to getting to know you better.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Interview Scheduling (Invite / Confirm / Reschedule)
templates.subject: Interview for [Job Title] at Convertt
templates.body:
Hi [Candidate First Name],

[INVITE: We enjoyed reviewing your profile and would like to invite you to an interview for the [Job Title] role.]
[CONFIRM: This confirms your interview for the [Job Title] role.]
[RESCHEDULE: We need to move your scheduled interview for the [Job Title] role — apologies for any inconvenience.]

Details:
• Format: [Video call / In-person / Phone]
• Date & Time: [Day, Date, Time + Timezone]
• Duration: [~45 minutes]
• [Meeting link / Office address — Mega Tower, Lahore]
• Interviewer(s): [Name, Title]

Please confirm this works, or suggest an alternative time. A quick tip: [have your portfolio ready / test your camera and mic].

Looking forward to speaking with you.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
variables: Meeting link / Office address — Mega Tower, Lahore
have your portfolio ready / test your camera and mic

templates.name: Assessment / Task Invitation
templates.subject: Next step — [Job Title] assessment
templates.body:
Hi [Candidate First Name],

As the next step for the [Job Title] role, we'd like you to complete a short [design task / assessment]. This helps us understand how you approach real work.

Details:
• Task: [brief description / attached / link]
• Estimated time: [X hours]
• Deadline: [Day, Date]
• Submit to: [hr@convertt.co / link]

There are no trick questions — we're interested in your thinking and process. If you need clarification or more time, just let us know.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Reference Check Request
templates.subject: Reference request for [Candidate Name]
templates.body:
Dear [Referee Name],

[Candidate Name] has applied for the [Job Title] role at Convertt and listed you as a reference. We'd be grateful for a few minutes of your time.

Could you share your perspective on:
• Your working relationship and its duration
• Their key strengths and areas of growth
• Reliability, teamwork, and overall performance

You can reply by email, or let us know a good time for a brief call. All information stays confidential.

Thank you for your help.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Post-Interview Thank You
templates.subject: Thank you for your time, [Candidate First Name]
templates.body:
Hi [Candidate First Name],

Thank you for taking the time to interview for the [Job Title] role today. It was a pleasure learning more about your experience and approach.

We're now completing our evaluations and expect to share an update by [date/timeframe]. If you have any questions in the meantime, feel free to reach out.

Thanks again for your interest in Convertt.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Candidate On Hold
templates.subject: An update on your [Job Title] application
templates.body:
Hi [Candidate First Name],

Thank you for your patience. An honest update: our hiring decision for the [Job Title] role is taking a little longer than expected due to [internal review / multiple strong candidates / timeline shift].

You're still very much in consideration, and we expect clarity by [date/timeframe]. We didn't want to leave you wondering.

Thank you for your continued interest.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
variables: internal review / multiple strong candidates / timeline shift

templates.name: Rejection (Application or Interview stage)
templates.delay: if last_stage>='interview' then +2h (next business day) else end_of_day
templates.subject: Update on your application — [Job Title]
templates.body:
Hi [Candidate First Name],

Thank you for [applying for / taking the time to interview for] the [Job Title] role at Convertt.

After careful consideration, we've decided to move forward with other candidates whose profiles more closely match our current needs. This was not an easy decision.

[INTERVIEW STAGE: We truly enjoyed our conversation, and this doesn't take away from your clear strengths in [specific area].]

We'd be glad to keep your details on file for future opportunities. We wish you all the best in your search.

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
variables: applying for / taking the time to interview for

templates.name: Job Offer Letter (Email)
templates.subject: Your offer to join Convertt as [Job Title]
templates.body:
Hi [Candidate First Name],

We're delighted to offer you the position of [Job Title] at Convertt! The team was impressed by you.

Key details:
• Role: [Job Title]
• Start date: [Date]
• Compensation: [PKR amount / package]
• Reporting to: [Manager Name, Title]
• Probation: 3 months
• Work location: [On-site / Hybrid — Mega Tower, Lahore]

Your formal offer letter is attached with full terms. Please review and let us know your decision by [date]. We're happy to answer any questions.

We're excited at the prospect of having you on board!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Offer Acceptance Acknowledgment
templates.subject: Welcome aboard, [Candidate First Name]!
templates.body:
Hi [Candidate First Name],

Wonderful news — we're thrilled you've accepted the [Job Title] offer and will be joining the Convertt family!

What happens next:
• We'll share onboarding details and first-day instructions closer to [start date].
• Please send over your joining documents (see the separate checklist email).

If you have any questions before you start, we're just an email away. Welcome to the team!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Talent Pool — Future Opportunities
templates.subject: Let's stay in touch — Convertt
templates.body:
Hi [Candidate First Name],

While we couldn't move forward together for the [Job Title] role this time, your profile genuinely stood out.

With your permission, we'd love to keep your details on file and reach out when a role that fits your skills opens up. Roles like [relevant area] come up regularly.

If that works for you, no action is needed — and you're always welcome to apply directly when something interests you.

Thank you, and we hope to connect again soon.

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Pre-Boarding Welcome
templates.subject: Welcome to Convertt, [First Name] — we can't wait for [start date]!
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

We're thrilled to officially welcome you to Convertt! Everyone is looking forward to having you join as [Job Title] on [start date].

Over the coming days we'll share your first-day details and onboarding plan. For now, sit back and relax — you're all set.

If you have any questions before you start, just reply to this email.

Welcome aboard!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Document & Joining Checklist
templates.subject: A few documents before your first day
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

To complete your verification and get your onboarding ready, please share the following before [date]:

• CNIC (front & back)
• Educational certificates / degree
• Previous experience / relieving letter [if applicable]
• Bank account details (for payroll)
• Recent photograph
• Signed offer letter

Please send these to hr@convertt.co. All documents are handled strictly confidentially and used only for HR records.

Thank you!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: First-Day Instructions
templates.subject: Your first day at Convertt — what to expect
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

We're excited to see you on [start date]! Here's everything for a smooth first day:

• Reporting time: [time]
• Location: Mega Tower, Lahore [floor / room]
• Ask for: [contact person, title]
• Dress code: [smart casual]
• Bring: [CNIC, documents]
• Lunch: [provided / nearby options]

Your first day includes a welcome, workspace setup, and team orientation. No need to prepare anything — just bring yourself.

See you soon!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: New Joiner Announcement (Internal)
templates.subject: Please welcome [New Hire Name] to the team!
templates.body:
Hi team,

Please join me in welcoming [New Hire Name], joining us as [Job Title] starting [start date], reporting to [Manager Name].

[A line or two: background, what they'll work on, a fun fact.]

[New Hire Name] will be sitting with the [team] team. Please say hello and help them feel at home.

Welcome aboard, [First Name]!

Best,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
variables: A line or two: background, what they'll work on, a fun fact.

templates.name: Account & System Access
templates.subject: Your Convertt accounts and access
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Your accounts are set up. To get started:

• Email: [name@convertt.co]
• Tools: [Slack, Google Workspace, project tools]
• Temporary password: [shared securely / set on first login]

Please change your password on first login and enable any required security settings. For access issues, contact [IT / admin].

Welcome to the team!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
variables: shared securely / set on first login

templates.name: Equipment / Asset Allocation
templates.subject: Your assigned equipment at Convertt
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

The following equipment has been assigned to you:

• [Laptop — model, asset ID]
• [Accessories — mouse, headset]
• [Access card / other]

Please confirm receipt by replying. Kindly take care of company assets — these are recorded under your name and returned at end of employment.

Thank you!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Buddy / Mentor Assignment
templates.subject: Meet your onboarding buddy at Convertt
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

To help you settle in, we've paired you with [Buddy Name] ([Buddy Title]) as your onboarding buddy.

[Buddy Name] is your go-to for any questions during your first few weeks — from how things work to where to find the best coffee.

[Buddy Name], please reach out and say hello. Glad to have you both connected!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Orientation / Induction Schedule
templates.subject: Your orientation schedule at Convertt
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Here's your orientation plan:

• [Day/Time] — Welcome & company overview
• [Day/Time] — Tools, systems & workspace setup
• [Day/Time] — Team & role intro with [Manager]
• [Day/Time] — HR policies & handbook walkthrough
• [Day/Time] — Q&A and first tasks

These sessions help, not overwhelm — ask anything along the way.

Looking forward to it!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Policy & Handbook Acknowledgment
templates.subject: Please review and acknowledge our HR policies
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Attached is the Convertt Employee Handbook with key policies (leave, conduct, NDA, WFH). Please read through them.

Once reviewed, kindly confirm your acknowledgment by [signing the attached form / replying] by [date].

These policies keep things clear and fair for everyone. If anything's unclear, we're happy to explain.

Thank you!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Probation Period Confirmation
templates.subject: Your probation period at Convertt
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

As outlined in your offer, your role begins with a 3-month probation, from [start date] to [end date].

You'll receive regular feedback and support throughout. A review near the end will confirm your permanent status.

Note: per policy, work-from-home is not available during probation. We're confident you'll do great — we're here to support you.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: 30 / 60 / 90-Day Check-In
templates.subject: Quick check-in — how's it going so far?
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

You've completed [30 / 60 / 90] days with us — congratulations and thank you!

We'd love to hear how you're settling in:
• What's going well?
• Anything challenging or unclear?
• How can we support you better?

Reply here, or let's grab [a quick call / coffee]. Your honest input helps us improve the experience.

Looking forward to your thoughts!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Employment Confirmation (Post-Probation)
templates.subject: Congratulations — you're now a permanent member of Convertt!
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Congratulations! You have successfully completed your 3-month probation as [Job Title]. Effective [date], you are now a permanent employee of Convertt.

Your hard work over the past months has been valued, and we're excited to have you continue growing with us. As a permanent employee, you're now entitled to [leave entitlement / benefits].

Here's to your continued success!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Probation Extension Notice
templates.subject: Regarding your probation period
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

After reviewing your progress, we've decided to extend your probation by [duration], until [new end date].

This gives us both more time to assess fit in [areas] and gives you the opportunity to strengthen [areas]. [Manager Name] will share specific expectations and support you.

We're invested in your success. Please reach out if you'd like to discuss.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Promotion Letter
templates.subject: Congratulations on your promotion, [First Name]!
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

In recognition of your strong performance, you have been promoted to [New Title], effective [date].

Along with this new role:
• Revised compensation: [details / see attached]
• Reporting to: [Manager Name]
• Key responsibilities: [brief note]

This is well-deserved. Congratulations from the entire team!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Salary Increment Letter
templates.subject: Your salary revision at Convertt
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Your compensation has been revised in recognition of your performance and commitment.

• Revised gross salary: [amount]
• Effective from: [date]

This reflects our appreciation of your contributions. Your updated details will appear in your next payroll cycle.

Thank you for all that you do — keep up the great work!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Role / Department Transfer
templates.subject: Your transfer to [New Team/Role]
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

We confirm your transfer to [New Role / Department], effective [date].

• New role: [Title]
• New reporting manager: [Manager Name]
• Context: [growth opportunity / business need]

Your current and new managers will coordinate a smooth handover. We're excited about this new chapter for you.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Contract Renewal
templates.subject: Renewal of your contract with Convertt
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Your current contract ends on [date], and we're happy to offer a renewal!

Proposed terms:
• Duration: [new term]
• Role: [Title]
• Compensation: [amount / unchanged]
• Start of new term: [date]

We've valued your contribution and would love to continue. Please review the attached contract and confirm by [date].

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Work-From-Home Approval
templates.subject: Your work-from-home request — approved
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Your request to work from home on [date(s) / arrangement] has been approved.

Reminders:
• Remain reachable during working hours ([hours])
• Update your status / calendar
• Keep deliverables on track

Note: WFH is not available during probation, per policy. Thanks for keeping the team informed — enjoy the flexibility!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Leave Approval / Rejection
templates.subject: Your leave request — [Approved / Update]
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Thank you for your leave request.

[APPROVED: Your leave from [start] to [end] ([X days]) is approved. Please ensure handover of pending tasks, and enjoy your time off!]
[NOT APPROVED: Unfortunately we can't approve leave for [dates] due to [coverage / deadlines]. Could we look at [alternative dates]?]

Your remaining leave balance: [X days].

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Leave Balance Reminder
templates.subject: Your leave balance update
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Your leave balance as of [date]:

• Total entitled: [X days]
• Used: [X days]
• Remaining: [X days]

[If near expiry: unused leave [carries over / lapses] by [date].]

We encourage you to plan time off and take the rest you've earned. Reach out to apply or with any questions.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
variables: If near expiry: unused leave [carries over / lapses

templates.name: Attendance / Late Coming Notice
templates.subject: A note regarding your attendance
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

We've noticed [late arrivals / attendance irregularities] over [period]. We wanted to check in rather than assume anything.

Standard working hours are [hours]. Consistent attendance helps the whole team stay aligned. If something's affecting your schedule, please let us know — we're happy to find a workable solution.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Document Update Request
templates.subject: Please update your records with HR
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

We're updating our HR records. Please confirm or update:

• Current address
• Phone number
• Emergency contact
• Bank account details
• [Any other]

Please reply with any changes by [date], or confirm everything is current. Accurate records ensure smooth payroll and communication.

Thank you!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Experience / Salary / Verification Letter
templates.subject: Your requested letter from Convertt
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

As requested, please find attached your [employment verification / experience / salary] letter, issued on Convertt letterhead.

It confirms [designation, employment dates, salary — as required for your purpose].

If you need additional details included or the letter sent to a specific party, let us know and we'll be glad to help.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
variables: designation, employment dates, salary — as required for your purpose

templates.name: Performance Review Cycle Kickoff
templates.subject: [Quarter/Year] performance reviews are here
templates.body:
Hi team,

It's time for our [Q2 / annual] performance review cycle! A chance to reflect on progress, celebrate wins, and set the path ahead.

Timeline:
• [Date] — Self-assessments due
• [Date] — Manager reviews
• [Date] — 1:1 discussions
• [Date] — Cycle closes

Forms: [link]. Reviews are about growth and recognition, not judgment — please engage openly.

Questions? Reach out to HR. Let's make it a productive cycle!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Review Reminder (Self / Manager)
templates.subject: Reminder: your review is due [date]
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

A friendly reminder that your [self-assessment / team reviews] for the [cycle] are due by [date]. [You have [X] reviews pending.]

[SELF: This is your space to highlight achievements, reflect on challenges, and share goals. Worth a thoughtful 30 minutes.]
[MANAGER: Be specific and balanced, tie feedback to examples, and prepare for the 1:1.]

Access here: [link]. Let us know if you need help.

Thank you!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Appraisal Outcome / Feedback
templates.subject: Your [cycle] performance review outcome
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Thank you for your engagement this cycle. A summary of your outcome:

• Overall: [rating / summary]
• Key strengths: [points]
• Growth areas: [points]
• [Increment / bonus / next steps, if applicable]

[Manager Name] will discuss this in detail during your 1:1. This is a foundation for your growth — we're here to support you.

Congratulations on your progress, and thank you for your contributions.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
variables: Increment / bonus / next steps, if applicable

templates.name: Goal-Setting (KPI / OKR) Request
templates.subject: Let's set your goals for [period]
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

As we head into [period], it's time to set your goals. Clear goals help you focus, grow, and have something concrete to celebrate later.

Please draft [3–5] specific, measurable goals aligned with your role and team objectives. Submit by [date] via [link], then finalize with [Manager Name].

Need help framing them? HR and your manager are happy to assist.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: PIP — Initiation & Check-In/Closure
templates.subject: Performance Improvement Plan — [First Name]
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

[INITIATION: Following recent discussions, we're putting in place a structured Performance Improvement Plan (PIP) to support you in meeting expectations.
• Duration: [30 / 60 days], [start] to [end]
• Focus areas: [points]
• Support: [coaching, resources, check-ins]
• Success criteria: [measurable targets]
The goal is your success — please treat this as a genuine opportunity.]

[CHECK-IN: At the [midpoint], here's where things stand: [progress]. Going well: [points]. Continue focusing on: [points].]

[CLOSURE — SUCCESS: You've met the goals set in your plan. Thank you for the effort — the plan is now closed.]
[CLOSURE — NEXT STEPS: After the plan period, [outcome]. Let's meet to discuss next steps.]

[Manager Name] and HR are here throughout. Let's connect on [date].

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Recognition / Appreciation
templates.subject: A big thank you, [First Name]!
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

We wanted to recognize your outstanding work on [project / achievement]. [Specific note about the impact.]

Your [dedication / creativity / teamwork] doesn't go unnoticed, and it makes a real difference to the team and to Convertt.

Thank you for being you — keep shining!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Warning Letter (Written Record)
templates.subject: Formal notice regarding [issue]
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

This serves as a formal [verbal record / written warning] regarding [specific issue — e.g. repeated absence, conduct, missed deadlines].

• Concern: [clear description]
• Previous discussion: [date, if any]
• Expectation going forward: [corrective action]
• Review period: [timeframe]

We value you and want this resolved positively. Continued [issue] may lead to further action per company policy. We're available to discuss and support improvement.

Please acknowledge receipt of this notice.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
variables: specific issue — e.g. repeated absence, conduct, missed deadlines

templates.name: Payroll Processed (Payslip + Credit)
templates.subject: Your salary & payslip for [Month Year]
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Your salary for [Month Year] has been processed and credited to your registered bank account.

• Net amount: [amount]
• Payment date: [date]

Your detailed payslip is attached, with a breakdown of gross salary, deductions, and net pay. Please review, and flag any discrepancy within [X days].

Your payslip is confidential — please keep it secure.

Thank you for your continued contribution!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Overtime / Allowance Confirmation
templates.subject: Overtime / allowance for [Month Year]
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

This confirms the [overtime / allowance] included in your [Month Year] pay:

• [Overtime hours: X]
• Calculation: [per policy]
• Amount: [PKR amount]

This reflects in your payslip. Thank you for the extra effort during [period] — it's genuinely appreciated.

Questions on the calculation? Just reply here.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Bonus / Incentive Announcement
templates.subject: Good news — your [bonus/incentive] details
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

You'll be receiving a [performance / annual / project] bonus in recognition of your contributions.

• Amount: [PKR amount]
• Payout with: [Month Year payroll / separate date]

Thank you for the value you bring to Convertt — a small token of our appreciation. Keep up the excellent work!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Tax Document Issuance
templates.subject: Your annual tax statement [FY]
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Please find attached your annual tax statement for [financial year], summarizing your earnings and tax deductions.

You may need this for your tax filing. If you require additional documentation or have questions about the figures, please reach out.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Payroll Discrepancy Resolution
templates.subject: Regarding your payroll query
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Thank you for flagging the discrepancy in your [Month Year] pay. We've looked into it.

• Issue: [description]
• Finding: [explanation]
• Resolution: [correction / adjustment in next cycle / one-off payment on date]

Apologies for any inconvenience. The correction reflects [when]. Please confirm once verified.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
variables: correction / adjustment in next cycle / one-off payment on date

templates.name: Bank Detail Update Confirmation
templates.subject: Your bank details have been updated
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

This confirms your payroll bank details have been updated:

• [Bank name / account ending in XXXX]
• Effective from: [Month Year payroll]

If you did NOT request this change, contact HR immediately. Otherwise no action is needed — your next salary credits to the updated account.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
variables: Bank name / account ending in XXXX

templates.name: Reimbursement Approval
templates.subject: Your reimbursement — approved
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Your reimbursement claim has been approved:

• Claim for: [description]
• Amount: [PKR amount]
• Payout: [with next payroll / by date]

Thank you for submitting the supporting documents. Let us know if you have any questions.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Final Settlement / Dues Statement
templates.subject: Your full and final settlement
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Please find attached your full and final settlement following your last working day on [date].

It includes:
• [Final / pro-rated salary]
• [Leave encashment, if applicable]
• [Deductions / recoveries, if any]
• Net payable: [amount]

The amount credits to your registered account by [date]. Please review and confirm. We wish you all the very best for the future.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Resignation Acknowledgment & Acceptance
templates.subject: Your resignation — acknowledged & confirmed
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

We've received your resignation from the position of [Job Title], and we acknowledge it with mixed feelings — sad to see you go, but grateful for your time with us.

We confirm the following:
• Last working day: [date]
• Notice period: [served / details]
• Pending: handover, asset return, exit interview, final settlement

We'll guide you through each step to make your transition as smooth as possible. Our door is open if you'd like to discuss anything.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Termination Letter
templates.subject: Notice of employment termination
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

This letter formally notifies you that your employment with Convertt will be terminated, effective [date], [for reason / as per terms discussed].

• Last working day: [date]
• [Notice period / pay in lieu, per policy]
• Final settlement: shared separately
• Asset return & access revocation: to be coordinated

We'll support you through the exit formalities. For questions, please reach out to HR.

We wish you well in your future endeavors.

Regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
variables: for reason / as per terms discussed
Notice period / pay in lieu, per policy

templates.name: Exit Interview Invitation
templates.subject: Let's have a chat before you go
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Before your last day on [date], we'd love a short exit interview. It's a relaxed, confidential conversation — your honest feedback genuinely helps us improve.

Could you share your availability for [a 30-minute slot] on [suggested dates]? In person or over a call, whichever you prefer.

Thank you, and we appreciate your openness.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Knowledge Transfer / Handover Request
templates.subject: Handover plan before your last day
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

To ensure a smooth transition, let's plan your handover ahead of [last working day].

Please prepare:
• A summary of ongoing tasks/projects and their status
• Key contacts, credentials [shared securely], and documentation
• Anything in-progress needing follow-up

Your work transfers primarily to [Name / team]. Let's align on a session by [date]. Thank you for setting your successor up for success.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Asset Return Reminder
templates.subject: Returning company assets before your last day
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

As you wrap up on [date], please arrange to return:

• [Laptop — asset ID]
• [Accessories]
• [Access card / other]

Kindly hand these to [contact / admin] by [date]. Asset return is part of clearance and final settlement. Thank you for taking care of them.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Access Revocation Notice (Internal)
templates.subject: Access revocation — [Employee Name], last day [date]
templates.body:
Hi [IT / Admin],

[Employee Name] ([Job Title]) leaves Convertt with a last working day of [date]. Please revoke access at end of day:

• Email & Google Workspace
• [Slack, project tools, repositories]
• [Building / card access]
• [Third-party systems]

Please confirm once completed, and coordinate timing so the handover isn't disrupted before the final day. Thank you!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Relieving & Experience Letter
templates.subject: Your relieving & experience letter from Convertt
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Please find attached your relieving and experience letter on Convertt letterhead.

It confirms you have been formally relieved effective [last working day], your role as [Job Title], and your tenure from [start] to [end], along with a note on your contribution. This serves as proof for future employment.

Should a future employer need verification, they're welcome to contact hr@convertt.co.

Thank you for your service. We wish you the very best ahead.

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Farewell Announcement (Internal)
templates.subject: Wishing [First Name] all the best
templates.body:
Hi team,

As you may know, [First Name] will be moving on from Convertt, with their last day on [date]. After [tenure] as [Job Title], they've left a real mark — [a line on contributions].

Please take a moment to share your good wishes [in person / here / at the farewell on date].

[First Name], thank you for everything. Wishing you nothing but success ahead!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
variables: in person / here / at the farewell on date

templates.name: Alumni / Stay-in-Touch
templates.subject: Once a Convertt-er, always a Convertt-er
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

Now that you've moved on to your next chapter, we just wanted to say — let's stay in touch!

You're always welcome to drop by, reach out, or come back if the timing's ever right. We'd also love to keep you in the loop on [alumni updates / opportunities], if you're open to it.

Thank you again for everything. Keep us posted on how you're doing!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Birthday / Work Anniversary
templates.subject: Happy [Birthday / Work Anniversary], [First Name]!
templates.body:
Hi [First Name],

[BIRTHDAY: Wishing you a very happy birthday! We hope your day is filled with joy, cake, and a little break from the inbox.]
[ANNIVERSARY: Congratulations on [X year(s)] with Convertt! Thank you for everything you've brought to the team — here's to many more.]

From all of us at Convertt — celebrate well, you've earned it!

Warm wishes,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Holiday / Public Holiday Announcement
templates.subject: Office closed for [Holiday] — [dates]
templates.body:
Hi team,

A quick heads-up: the office will be closed for [Holiday] on [date(s)]. Normal operations resume on [date].

Please plan deliverables and client communications accordingly, and inform relevant stakeholders. [Any on-call / WFH notes.]

Enjoy the break — you deserve it!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Event / Town Hall Invitation
templates.subject: You're invited: [Event Name] on [date]
templates.body:
Hi team,

We're excited to invite you to [Event Name — town hall / team lunch / offsite]!

• Date & time: [details]
• Location: [venue / link]
• What to expect: [agenda highlights]

[Any RSVP / prep instructions.] These moments are about connecting beyond work — we'd love to see you all there.

See you on [date]!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
variables: Event Name — town hall / team lunch / offsite

templates.name: Employee Survey / Pulse Check
templates.subject: We'd love your honest feedback — [Survey Name]
templates.body:
Hi team,

Your experience at Convertt matters, and we want to keep making it better. Please take [X minutes] to complete our [pulse check / engagement survey].

• Link: [survey link]
• Deadline: [date]
• [Anonymous / responses confidential]

No right or wrong answers — just be honest. We read every response and act on what we learn.

Thank you for helping shape a better Convertt!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Policy Update Announcement
templates.subject: Update to our [policy name]
templates.body:
Hi team,

We're updating our [policy name], effective [date]. What's changing and why:

• What's changing: [summary]
• Why: [reason]
• What it means for you: [practical impact]

The full updated policy is available [attached / on the HR drive]. Please give it a read, and reach out to HR with any questions.

Thank you for staying informed!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Wellness / Benefits Program
templates.subject: Taking care of you — [Program Name]
templates.body:
Hi team,

Your wellbeing matters, so we're excited to share [Program Name]!

• What it is: [description]
• How to access / participate: [steps]
• When: [dates / ongoing]

[Any benefit details.] We encourage you to make the most of it. A healthy, happy team is what makes Convertt great.

Questions? HR is here to help.

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Training / L&D Invitation
templates.subject: Level up: [Training Name] on [date]
templates.body:
Hi team,

We're hosting a [training / workshop] on [topic] — a great chance to grow your skills.

• Date & time: [details]
• Format: [in-person / online — link]
• Facilitator: [name]
• For: [whole team / specific roles]

[RSVP / prep instructions.] Investing in your growth is investing in all of us. We hope you'll join!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Referral Program
templates.subject: Know someone great? Refer them to Convertt
templates.body:
Hi team,

We're hiring, and the best people often know other great people — that's where you come in!

We're looking for [roles]. Refer someone we hire and you'll receive [referral bonus / reward].

How to refer:
• Send their CV/profile to hr@convertt.co
• Mention the role and why they'd be a fit

Help us grow the team with people you'd love to work alongside. Thank you!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt

templates.name: Festive Greetings
templates.subject: [Festival] greetings from Convertt!
templates.body:
Hi team,

Wishing you and your loved ones a wonderful [Eid / New Year / festival]!

May this occasion bring you joy, rest, and good company. Thank you for everything you do — we're grateful to have you as part of the Convertt family.

[Any holiday/closure note.]

Warm wishes,
[Your Name]
HR Team, Convertt
